definition: When the market tells you the old structure is dead. Not a pullback. A regime shift.

steps.label: The old regime
steps.detail: Buy yen. Buy euros. Accumulate Treasuries. Three weeks straight.

steps.label: The exhaustion
steps.detail: 225K added. Then 165K. Then 75K. Then zero. The bid went full.

steps.label: The sweep
steps.detail: JPY longs liquidated 58% in five days. EUR down 10%. Everything unwound at once.

steps.label: What survived
steps.detail: AUD. Record CFTC build. Didn't flinch. That's the new regime.

cotConfirmation: Treasury accumulation hit zero. JPY swept from 42,871 to 17,904 in one week. AUD held at 28,878 — largest single-week build in CFTC history.
takeaway: When everything unwinds except one thing, that one thing tells you where the next move lives.

captions.text: Three weeks of the same playbook. Then the rules changed.
The old playbook: buy yen, buy euros, load up on Treasuries.
Then yen got swept. 42,871 contracts down to 17,904.
Euros dropped 10%. Everything they were doing — undone.
Except AUD. Record build. Held through all of it.
When everything unwinds except one thing, that thing is the next move.
Like and subscribe. Full read in link in bio.

voiceover.text: Fifty-eight percent. Liquidated. In five days.
For three weeks, big money had one playbook. Buy yen for protection, buy euros against the dollar, load up on Treasuries. Then the rules changed.

Treasury buying was decelerating. 225 thousand, then 165 thousand, then 75 thousand, then zero. The buying just stopped. Then yen positions got swept. 42,871 contracts down to 17,904. That's 58% gone in five days. Three weeks of hedging, wiped in one week. Euros dropped 10%. Everything they'd been building, undone at once. But one thing held. Australian dollar. 28,878 contracts. Biggest single-week build in CFTC history. Didn't move while everything around it collapsed.
The old playbook died. The new one just started. When everything unwinds except one thing, that one thing tells you where the next move lives.
Like and subscribe. Full breakdown in the link in bio.
